title: dimocarpus longan var. malesianus
intro: Dimocarpus longan var. malesianus, also known as the Longan tree, is a species of fruit-bearing tree native to Southeast Asia. It is renowned for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Dimocarpus longan var. malesianus include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cardiovascular health, and providing protection against certain types of cancer. In traditional herbal medicine, Longan tree is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being dried and used in herbal preparations such as capsules and powders.
